headline: Paramount intends to sell leveraged buyout debt, Bloomberg says
summary: Paramount Skydance (PSKY) stretched itself thin in its $110B takeover bid for Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD) and now the companies’ bankers are preparing to bring the $50B debt sale for the buyout to market, Aaron Weinman and Davide Barbuscia of Bloomberg reports.Claim 55% Off TipRanksUnlock trusted, data-backed investing tools with TipRanks Premium, from analyst ratings and forecasts to breaking news and portfolio analysis.
